scripts.build: pnpm --filter @mlightcad/text-box-cursor build && pnpm --filter @mlightcad/mtext-input-box build && pnpm --filter @mlightcad/demo-canvas-cursor build && pnpm --filter @mlightcad/demo-three-cursor build && pnpm --filter @mlightcad/demo-mtext-input-box build
scripts.publish:mtext: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @mlightcad/text-box-cursor publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @mlightcad/mtext-input-box publish --access public --no-git-checks
